Interface ISpectralSample

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to a SpectralSample Interface.

[Guid("FE137721-C242-4515-B499-6A55262DA6E7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpectralSample

Properties

Characteristics

Gets the list of Spectral Sample properties specific for the library type.

IPropertySet Characteristics { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Gets the Spectral Sample name.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReflectanceData

Gets the array of reflectance data.

IDoubleArray ReflectanceData { get; set; }

Property Value

IDoubleArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

SampleId

Gets the Spectral Sample Id.

Guid SampleId { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Examples

Sample Snippet

ScaleFactor

Gets the Scale Factor value.

double ScaleFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SensorId

Gets the Spectral Sensor Id that holds the wavelengths for this Sample.

Guid SensorId { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Create(Guid, string, Guid, IDoubleArray, double) 

void Create(Guid SampleId, string sampleName, Guid SensorId, IDoubleArray pReflectanceData, double ScaleFactor)

Parameters

SampleId Guid
sampleName string
SensorId Guid
pReflectanceData IDoubleArray
ScaleFactor double

USGSBasicLoad(string, bool)

Loads the basic characteristics of a Spectral Sample located in the specified path. No spectral data is loaded.

void USGSBasicLoad(string Path, bool createId)

Parameters

Path string
createId bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

USGSFullyLoad(string, bool)

Loads all the properties of a Spectral Sample, including reflectance data, located in the specified path.

void USGSFullyLoad(string Path, bool createId)

Parameters

Path string
createId bool
